'''Norrion Glidamir''' was a [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdian]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and a [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
Glidamir studied in the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]] and was a member of the [[Twilight Class]]. She excelled at the school, breaking the record of a previous class, and then went on to join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="air" />

An expert in urban survival, Glidamir became a major in the Rebel Alliance Army. She knew that her dean at the school, [[Barosa Warren]], had became a threat to the Rebel Alliance and wrote a report about him.<ref name="air" />

During the [[Battle of Archais]], Glidamir's maneuvers were essential in rescuing [[Akul Witig]]'s unit when they were trapped on [[Tylerin Embankment|Tylerin Enbankment]].<ref name="air" />

Glidamir took part in the [[Attack on the Pirik system|attacks on Corint City]], and behaved heroically, for which she was decorated.<ref name="air" />

Soon afterwards, however, Glidamir died in service to the Rebel Alliance during the early battles of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="air" />
